THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOXLEY, EILEEN MOXLEY, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 401 MIGUEL ST, #2, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS.
